# Lattice Based Modeling

**Summary**: A computational fluid dynamics method used to simulate flow through porous media.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-g201703430kfupmedusa|g201703430@kfupm.edu.sa, 2019]] applied lattice-based-modeling to estimate permeability from segmented 3D images.
